paymentSuccess.seoDescription: Your enrolment is confirmed. We'll be in touch shortly to schedule the first session.
paymentSuccess.p1: Thank you. Your payment has been confirmed and a receipt has been sent to your email.
paymentSuccess.p2: We'll reach out within 1 business day at the email you used at checkout to schedule the kick-off conversation and align on dates, participants, and tools.

paymentCanceled.seoDescription: Your checkout was canceled. No charge was made. You can resume any time.
paymentCanceled.body: Your checkout was canceled. No payment was processed. If something blocked you or you'd like to talk first, we're happy to.

notFound.seoDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.subtitle: Oops! Page not found
